Initial dialogue line. ISA stands for International Space Center. SETTING: in this internal dialogue, the AI reflects upon the Fire Dragon mission after they have found an abandoned building that belonged to that mission.

At this point of the story, on Earth, there's a rivalry between eastern and western countries that has splitted the world into two major alliances. The eastern side is called "The Tekkies", because technology is their main economic business. The western side is called "Oxies" because they have conformed an intergovernmental organization called Oxy-UN. There are a few countries which do not belong to any of these two alliances, like some parts of Africa, the Middle East, Australia, and what has survived from Russia after a huge meteorite crashed into the region and released toxic fumes to the air.

Initial dialogue line. SETTING: the player has built the first food factory, needed to feed the colonists. There are three possible previous conditions that can lead the player to this point: 1- The colonists have arrived, and AMI and Elya have already talked to each other./ 2- The colonists have arrived, and AMI and Elya never talked before./ 3- The colonists haven't arrived yet, and AMI and Elya never talked before. Depending on the case, this can be the initial line. Otherwise, the dialogue begins a few rows down. Since AMI is an AI, they don't have a gender and they use the singular 'they', 'their' and 'them'.
The word contained by must be emphasized.
